figure.name: Solo Spot Volta to Left
figure.preceding_figure_names: Maypole, Natural Basic Movement, Reverse Basic Movement, Samba Locks, Samba Walk: Stationary, Side Basic Movement
figure.following_figure_names: Whisk To Left, Samba Walk: Stationary (RF), Solo Spot Volta to Left (Lady to Right), Argentine Crosses
figure.notes:
Note:
Man and Lady can switch, i.e. Man does Lady's part and vice versa.
Continuous Spot Voltas: Can repeat 2&3 twice for an additional bar of music, completing another full turn. Count "a1 a2". Continue 'pedaling' with the foot (stepping fwd) while keeping the other foot at same place.
Combination: whisk to underarm turn to R for Lady, then start turning L for Solo Spot Volta. Normally does it in 2's or 4's in same direction and then switch direction.

steps.action: LF in front of RF (Cuban Cross)
comments: Move LH slightly to L to turn Lady to R, then release hold

steps.action: RF to side and slightly back w/o weight. Toe turned out
Take part of weight to RF and swivel on ball of LF, keeping it in place. End LF in front of RF (Cuban Cross) in Closed Position
comments: Regain required hold at end of turn
Heel lowers at end of turn

steps.action: RF in front of LF (Cuban Cross)
comments: Start with LF in front, RF cuban cross in back
Lady's RH patty cake with Man's LH.

steps.action: Turn 1/2 to R (like body is unwinding)
Weight on RF, RF crossed in front of LF, L knee tucked behind R knee
comments: RF crossed in front of LF

steps.action: LF to side and slightly back w/o weight. Toe turned out. 1/2 to R over 2&3
Take part of weight to LF and swivel on ball of RF, keeping it in place. End RF in front of LF (Cuban Cross) in Closed Position
comments: End RF in front of LF (Cuban Cross) in Closed Position
To shorten the distance with Man, slide RF a bit fwd. L knee tucked behind R knee.
Heel lowers at end of turn

figure.name: Solo Spot Volta to Right
figure.preceding_figure_names: Argentine Crosses, Corta Jaca, Natural Basic Movement, Reverse Basic Movement, Samba Walk: Side, Samba Walk: Stationary, Side Basic Movement
figure.following_figure_names: Whisk To Right, Samba Walk: Stationary (LF), Solo Spot Volta to Right (Lady to Left), Argentine Crosses (started with RF)
figure.notes:
Note:

Continuous Spot Voltas: Can repeat 2&3 twice for an additional bar of music, completing another full turn. Count "a1 a2". Continue 'pedaling' with the foot (stepping fwd) while keeping the other foot at same place.
Combination: whisk to underarm turn to R for Lady, then start turning L for Solo Spot Volta. Normally does it in 2's or 4's in same direction and then switch direction.
